title: fedora package isn't picking up pyxdg and requests deps from upstream files
body:
For whatever reason, rpm packaging isn't automatically picking up the `pyxdg` and `requests` dependencies from upstream. 

See:
1. https://kojipkgs.fedoraproject.org//work/tasks/7254/73967254/build.log
2. https://kojipkgs.fedoraproject.org//work/tasks/7700/73967700/build.log

If I specify deps explicitly in the rpm specs, it builds fine.

Not yet sure if this is an issue upstream or with fedora's python packaging.

comments.body: @rhatdan @jwhonce @baude ^ .. I totally forgot about this issue after filing it. So something changed v3.1.2.4 -> v3.2.0 which causes fedora's python packaging framework to not pick up dependencies automatically.
